title: Source Index (parquet column contract)
description: Documents the columns of snapshots/<v>/source_index.parquet — the only artifact the delta engine reads to compare drops. The parquet is row-per-source-record. This JSON Schema describes ONE such row (the per-row logical shape); the file is a table of these. See 01-operating-model.md §2.

x-parquet.note: raw cell values are stored as additional columns alongside the fixed columns below; they are namespaced under raw.* to avoid collision with the fixed columns.

table.description: Normalized source table name this row came from.

source_id.description: "<table>:<source_key>" — the sacred stable identity. external_id is derived from this. See §2.

row_hash.description: Stable hash of the row's normalized raw cell values; detects whether the record changed between drops. Hex digest.

source_row.description: 1-based original row number in the source table (provenance).

key_is_hashed.description: True when source_key was derived by hashing identifying columns (no stable client key) — flags fragility.

raw.description: The record's raw cell values, column-name → value, exactly as normalized at ingest (strings preserved; nulls allowed). Stored physically as raw.<column> parquet columns.
